svg.title: Shopping cart system flowchart
svg.desc: A verbose flowchart showing every step of the C# shopping cart program from start to end.

g.text: Create menu array, cart arrays, count = 0
Is the input a valid number?
Is the product out of stock?
Loop cartId[], check for matching Id
Is there space in the cart array?
Loop cart, print each item & subtotal
Print grand total or discounted total
